creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-02-07 00:19:46 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics             Makefile 
  Added files:
    graphics/tonicpoint-viewer Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    graphics/tonicpoint-viewer/files tonicpoint 
  Log:
  The TonicPoint Viewer is a standalone Java application that allows you to open
  and view PowerPoint presentations on any platform.
  The Viewer supports the standard PowerPoint file format that is used
  by PowerPoint 97, 2000, XP, 2003, etc.
  
  WWW:    http://tonicsystems.com/products/viewer/
  
  PR:             ports/108825
  Submitted by:   ports at c0decafe.net
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1039    +1 -0      ports/graphics/Makefile
  1.1       +43 -0     ports/graphics/tonicpoint-viewer/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/graphics/tonicpoint-viewer/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/graphics/tonicpoint-viewer/files/tonicpoint (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/graphics/tonicpoint-viewer/pkg-descr (new)
